scope.target: Classify .ai and .dev files as universal concept, .NET backend implementation, repo-specific truth, archive, or deferred.
constraints: Patterns and conceptual design may be universal.
Implementation and code-planning details are non-universal or tech-stack-specific.
non_goals: Do not move files during classification.

user_constraints: DDD, CA, Repository, and concept design can be universal.
Implementation and code-planning material is non-universal.

steps: Classify files by concept versus implementation boundary.

results.summary: Classified .ai and .dev documentation into universal concept, dotnet-backend implementation, repo-specific truth, runtime-wrapper, and deferred-review classes. Identified low-risk .ai top-level files for later relocation and deferred high-risk scripts/sub-agent system moves.
tests_run: Reviewed selected .ai/assets/shared and dotnet-backend shared files
